issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing 'count' parameter (should be 4), missing 'filter' for card types ({Neptunian} or {Fish-Man Island}), missing 'maxResults' constraint (up to 1), and missing specification that remaining cards go to bottom of deck.
Second effect with DrawCard is incorrect. The card effect does not draw cards; it reveals and selects from looked-at cards. This entire effect should be removed.

Trigger 'Activated' is correct for a [Main] effect, but the actions don't match the full card text. The DSL must capture: look at 4 cards, reveal up to 1 matching type, add to hand, and place rest at bottom in any order.
